judge_reason: The two descriptions refer to completely different visual content (Description A describes hole punches and a page number, while Description B describes a detailed chart or table).
original_image_tags: Large black circular hole punch marks are visible in the upper right and lower right corners of the page. Page number "xi" is centered at the bottom.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A black-and-white tabular chart titled “ANNUAL LAUNCH SUMMARY BY BOOSTER,” labeled “Chart I 1958 - 1978,” showing rows of launch vehicle names and columns for years 58 through 78 with numeric counts and subtotal columns.*
